scene: Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A small round-headed stick-figure player at the bottom looking up at a HUGE grinning slot machine looming above and filling the upper frame. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. The stick figure slumped and defeated, head down, pockets turned inside-out and empty, a couple of gold coins rolling away, with lots of empty space above him so he reads small and beaten. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A giant clock filling the frame with its hands made of the slot-machine lever-arm, a tiny player being pulled into it. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. Vertical stacked slot reels filling the frame: two matching gold bells lined up and a third bell stopped one notch too high, an agonized sweating player below. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A grinning slot machine erupting with celebration lights and confetti at the top while at the bottom the player's coin pile is visibly shrinking. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A tall maze filling the vertical frame with a tiny lost player inside, no clocks on the walls, a faint green exit sign that is out of reach. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. The player stuck to a chair at the slot machine, sticky cords and glue holding him down as he strains to get up. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, on a bold deep-red background, black linework with selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A hand holding up a smartphone that fills the frame, its screen an endless maze and scroll with the same grinning face as the slot machine. No text.
